identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Function is Beauty. Dark Mode is Mandatory.

borders.special: Corner accents (reticle style) on video feeds

structure.description: Minimalist top bar. Left: System Name (Tactical Font). Right: Status Indicators (CPU, FPS, Mode). Glassmorphism.
structure.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 glass

structure.description: Bento Grid layout. Video Feed is dominant. Stats and Logs are auxiliary.
structure.classes: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 pt-24 h-screen overflow-hidden

children.span: col-span-1 lg:col-span-9 row-span-2 relative border border-white/10 bg-surface
children.notes: Must have 'Corner Brackets' svg overlays. Red border flash on detection.

children.span: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 row-span-1 h-full border border-white/10 bg-surface flex flex-col
children.notes: Scrollable list of recent detections. High contrast timestamps.

children.span: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 row-span-1 h-full border border-white/10 bg-surface
children.notes: Donut charts or Bar charts for 'Weapon Count', 'Accuracy', 'Uptime'.

VideoFeed.style: Relative container. Video element fills container. Canvas overlay for Bounding Boxes.

AlertItem.style: Flex row. Left: Icon (AlertTriangle). Middle: Text (Type + Confidence). Right: Time.

StatCard.style: p-4 flex flex-col gap-2. Label: Uppercase tracking-widest text-muted text-xs. Value: text-3xl font-mono text-white.

ControlBar.style: Fixed bottom or overlay on video. Pill shaped or rectangular technical bar.
ControlBar.buttons: h-10 px-6 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 active:scale-95 transition-all

universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure high contrast for alerts. Use texture (stripe patterns) for color-blind friendly bounding boxes.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use smooth transitions for hover states. Use 'animate-pulse' for active critical alerts.
universal_guidelines.interaction: Buttons must have active states. Hovering over a log item should highlight the timestamp.
universal_guidelines.code_structure: Use Functional Components with Hooks. Use Tailwind for all styling. No external CSS files for components.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update `index.css` with the font imports and base theme colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the `components/ui` folder for reusable Shadcn-like primitives (Button, Card, Badge) but styled manually with Tailwind if shadcn is not pre-installed.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the `VideoFeed` component first as it is the core feature. Mock the webcam feed if hardware is unavailable, but write code for `navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia`.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the `Dashboard` layout using the Grid strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Connect the WebSocket or API polling for detection data.
